title: Tunisian Bourek with Honey and Dates
description: A traditional Tunisian dish featuring soft sugar and a wood-fired-bake. This aerated dessert is perfect for warm evenings and pairs well with a cup of herbal tea.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt until well combined.
Add the chopped almonds and mix until the dough is crumbly.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, water, and honey until smooth.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush them with oil.
Bake the bourek for 20-25 minutes or until they are golden brown.
Let the bourek cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the bourek warm with a side of honey and dates.
You can also enjoy the bourek with a cup of herbal tea.
